lines.english: Lesson 27
lines.chinese: 第27课
lines.raw: Lesson 27 | 第27课

lines.english: The 'Vasa'
lines.chinese: “瓦萨”号
lines.raw: The 'Vasa' | “瓦萨”号

lines.english: What happened to the 'Vasa' almost immediately after she was launched?
lines.chinese: “瓦萨”号下水后几乎立刻发生了什么？
lines.raw: What happened to the 'Vasa' almost immediately after she was launched? | “瓦萨”号下水后几乎立刻发生了什么？

lines.english: From the seventeenth-century empire of Sweden,
lines.chinese: 17世纪的瑞典王国
lines.raw: From the seventeenth-century empire of Sweden, | 17世纪的瑞典王国

lines.english: the story of a galleon that sank at the start of her maiden voyage in 1628 must be one of the strangest tales of the sea.
lines.chinese: 一艘名为“瓦萨”的帆船在1628年首次出航时就沉没了。这个故事一定是航海史上最离奇的事件之一。
lines.raw: the story of a galleon that sank at the start of her maiden voyage in 1628 must be one of the strangest tales of the sea. | 一艘名为“瓦萨”的帆船在1628年首次出航时就沉没了。这个故事一定是航海史上最离奇的事件之一。

lines.english: For nearly three and a half centuries she lay at the bottom of Stockholm harbour until her discovery in 1956.
lines.chinese: 她在斯德哥尔摩港湾海底沉睡了将近3个半世纪，直到1956年才被发现。
lines.raw: For nearly three and a half centuries she lay at the bottom of Stockholm harbour until her discovery in 1956. | 她在斯德哥尔摩港湾海底沉睡了将近3个半世纪，直到1956年才被发现。

lines.english: This was the Vasa, royal flagship of the great imperial fleet.
lines.chinese: 这就是“瓦萨”号，一支强大皇家舰队的旗舰。
lines.raw: This was the Vasa, royal flagship of the great imperial fleet. | 这就是“瓦萨”号，一支强大皇家舰队的旗舰。

lines.english: King Gustavus Adolphus 'The Northern Hurricane',
lines.chinese: 国王古斯塔夫·阿道夫，人称“北方飓风”，
lines.raw: King Gustavus Adolphus 'The Northern Hurricane', | 国王古斯塔夫·阿道夫，人称“北方飓风”，

lines.english: then at the height of his military success in the 'Thirty Years' War,
lines.chinese: 当时正处于“三十年战争”军事胜利的巅峰时期，
lines.raw: then at the height of his military success in the 'Thirty Years' War, | 当时正处于“三十年战争”军事胜利的巅峰时期，

lines.english: had dictated her measurements and armament.
lines.chinese: 亲自规定了“瓦萨”号的尺寸和武器装备。
lines.raw: had dictated her measurements and armament. | 亲自规定了“瓦萨”号的尺寸和武器装备。

lines.english: Triple gun-decks mounted sixty-four bronze cannon.
lines.chinese: 三层炮甲板上装载着64门青铜大炮。
lines.raw: Triple gun-decks mounted sixty-four bronze cannon. | 三层炮甲板上装载着64门青铜大炮。

lines.english: She was intended to play a leading role in the growing might of Sweden.
lines.chinese: 她注定要在瑞典日益壮大的国力中扮演重要角色。
lines.raw: She was intended to play a leading role in the growing might of Sweden. | 她注定要在瑞典日益壮大的国力中扮演重要角色。

lines.english: As she was prepared for her maiden voyage on August 10, 1628, Stockholm was in a ferment.
lines.chinese: 1628年8月10日，“瓦萨”号准备首次航行，斯德哥尔摩一片沸腾。
lines.raw: As she was prepared for her maiden voyage on August 10, 1628, Stockholm was in a ferment. | 1628年8月10日，“瓦萨”号准备首次航行，斯德哥尔摩一片沸腾。

lines.english: From the Skeppsbron and surrounding islands
lines.chinese: 从海事博物馆码头和周围的岛屿，
lines.raw: From the Skeppsbron and surrounding islands | 从海事博物馆码头和周围的岛屿，

lines.english: the people watched this thing of beauty begin to spread her sails and catch the wind.
lines.chinese: 人们看着这艘美丽的船开始张帆起航，乘风破浪。
lines.raw: the people watched this thing of beauty begin to spread her sails and catch the wind. | 人们看着这艘美丽的船开始张帆起航，乘风破浪。

lines.english: They had laboured for three years to produce this floating work of art;
lines.chinese: 人们辛劳了3年才建造出这艘漂浮的艺术品；
lines.raw: They had laboured for three years to produce this floating work of art; | 人们辛劳了3年才建造出这艘漂浮的艺术品；

lines.english: she was more richly carved and ornamented than any previous ship.
lines.chinese: 她比以往任何一艘船都雕刻得更精美，装饰得更华丽。
lines.raw: she was more richly carved and ornamented than any previous ship. | 她比以往任何一艘船都雕刻得更精美，装饰得更华丽。

lines.english: The high stern castle was a riot of carved gods, demons, knights, kings, warriors,
lines.chinese: 高高的船尾楼雕刻着众神、恶魔、骑士、国王、武士、
lines.raw: The high stern castle was a riot of carved gods, demons, knights, kings, warriors, | 高高的船尾楼雕刻着众神、恶魔、骑士、国王、武士、

lines.english: mermaids, cherubs; and zoomorphic animal shapes ablaze with red and gold and blue,
lines.chinese: 美人鱼、小天使；还有栩栩如生的动物造型，它们都被漆成红、金和蓝色，
lines.raw: mermaids, cherubs; and zoomorphic animal shapes ablaze with red and gold and blue, | 美人鱼、小天使；还有栩栩如生的动物造型，它们都被漆成红、金和蓝色，

lines.english: symbols of courage, power, and cruelty,
lines.chinese: 象征着勇气、力量和残酷，
lines.raw: symbols of courage, power, and cruelty, | 象征着勇气、力量和残酷，

lines.english: were portrayed to stir the imaginations of the superstitious sailors of the day.
lines.chinese: 旨在激发当时迷信水手们的想象力。
lines.raw: were portrayed to stir the imaginations of the superstitious sailors of the day. | 旨在激发当时迷信水手们的想象力。

lines.english: Then the cannons of the anchored warships thundered a salute to which the Vasa fired in reply.
lines.chinese: 锚泊的军舰鸣炮致敬，“瓦萨”号也鸣炮回敬。
lines.raw: Then the cannons of the anchored warships thundered a salute to which the Vasa fired in reply. | 锚泊的军舰鸣炮致敬，“瓦萨”号也鸣炮回敬。

lines.english: As she emerged from her drifting cloud of gun smoke with the water churned to foam beneath her bow,
lines.chinese: 当她从漂浮的硝烟中驶出，船头下的水花翻腾成泡沫，
lines.raw: As she emerged from her drifting cloud of gun smoke with the water churned to foam beneath her bow, | 当她从漂浮的硝烟中驶出，船头下的水花翻腾成泡沫，

lines.english: her flags flying, pennants waving, sails filling in the breeze,
lines.chinese: 旗帜飘扬，三角旗招展，风帆鼓满，
lines.raw: her flags flying, pennants waving, sails filling in the breeze, | 旗帜飘扬，三角旗招展，风帆鼓满，

lines.english: and the red and gold or her superstructure ablaze with colour,
lines.chinese: 红金相间的上层建筑色彩斑斓，
lines.raw: and the red and gold or her superstructure ablaze with colour, | 红金相间的上层建筑色彩斑斓，

lines.english: she presented a more majestic spectacle than Stockholmers had ever seen before.
lines.chinese: 她展现出斯德哥尔摩人前所未见的雄伟景象。
lines.raw: she presented a more majestic spectacle than Stockholmers had ever seen before. | 她展现出斯德哥尔摩人前所未见的雄伟景象。

lines.english: All gun-ports were open and the muzzles peeped wickedly from them.
lines.chinese: 所有的炮门都敞开着，炮口不怀好意地探出。
lines.raw: All gun-ports were open and the muzzles peeped wickedly from them. | 所有的炮门都敞开着，炮口不怀好意地探出。

lines.english: As the wind freshened there came a sudden squall and the ship made a strange movement, listing to port.
lines.chinese: 随着风势渐强，一阵突如其来的飑风袭来，船身做了一个奇怪的动作，向左舷倾斜。
lines.raw: As the wind freshened there came a sudden squall and the ship made a strange movement, listing to port. | 随着风势渐强，一阵突如其来的飑风袭来，船身做了一个奇怪的动作，向左舷倾斜。

lines.english: The Ordnance officer ordered all the port cannon to be heaved to starboard
lines.chinese: 炮兵军官命令将所有左舷的大炮都移到右舷，
lines.raw: The Ordnance officer ordered all the port cannon to be heaved to starboard | 炮兵军官命令将所有左舷的大炮都移到右舷，

lines.english: to counteract the list but the steepening angle of the decks increased.
lines.chinese: 以抵消倾斜，但甲板的倾斜角度反而加剧了。
lines.raw: to counteract the list but the steepening angle of the decks increased. | 以抵消倾斜，但甲板的倾斜角度反而加剧了。

lines.english: Then the sound of rumbling thunder reached the watchers on the shore,
lines.chinese: 接着，隆隆的雷鸣声传到了岸上的观望者耳中，
lines.raw: Then the sound of rumbling thunder reached the watchers on the shore, | 接着，隆隆的雷鸣声传到了岸上的观望者耳中，

lines.english: as cargo, ballast, ammunition and 400 people went sliding and crashing down to the port side of the steeply listing ship.
lines.chinese: 原来是货物、压舱物、弹药和400名船员滑向急剧倾斜的船只的左舷，发出撞击声。
lines.raw: as cargo, ballast, ammunition and 400 people went sliding and crashing down to the port side of the steeply listing ship. | 原来是货物、压舱物、弹药和400名船员滑向急剧倾斜的船只的左舷，发出撞击声。

lines.english: The lower gun-ports were now below water and the inrush sealed the ship's fate.
lines.chinese: 下层炮门现在已在水面之下，涌入的海水注定了这艘船的命运。
lines.raw: The lower gun-ports were now below water and the inrush sealed the ship's fate. | 下层炮门现在已在水面之下，涌入的海水注定了这艘船的命运。

lines.english: In that first glorious hour, the mighty Vasa, which was intended to rule the Baltic,
lines.chinese: 在那光荣的第一个小时，原本注定要称霸波罗的海的“瓦萨”号，
lines.raw: In that first glorious hour, the mighty Vasa, which was intended to rule the Baltic, | 在那光荣的第一个小时，原本注定要称霸波罗的海的“瓦萨”号，

lines.english: sank with all flags flying--in the harbour of her birth.
lines.chinese: 带着所有飘扬的旗帜，沉入了她诞生时的港口。
lines.raw: sank with all flags flying--in the harbour of her birth. | 带着所有飘扬的旗帜，沉入了她诞生时的港口。
